subcodes.first_line: O thou compassionate friend! The ears of the longing ones ever await to hear tidings of their friends, and the heart yearneth for news of their names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار مهربان سمع مشتاقان همواره منتظر استماع خبر دوستانست و قلب تفقد نام و
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @call to action, @power of love, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
